28:
SELECT d.School, d.DOCType
FROM (
    SELECT s.School,
           s.DOCType,
           f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS diff
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
) d
WHERE d.diff > (SELECT AVG(diff) FROM (
    SELECT f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS diff
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
) sub);	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT nc.fname AS FirstName, an.District
FROM (
    SELECT fname, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT AdmFName1 AS fname, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
    )
    GROUP BY fname
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 2
) AS nc
JOIN (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS fname, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
) AS an ON an.fname = nc.fname
ORDER BY nc.cnt DESC, an.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT 
    ((b_end.balance - b_start.balance) * 100.0 / b_start.balance) AS increase_rate
FROM
    (SELECT l.account_id
     FROM loan l
     WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND l.status = 'approved'
     ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
     LIMIT 1) AS first_loan
JOIN
    (SELECT balance
     FROM trans t
     WHERE t.account_id = first_loan.account_id
       AND t.date = '1993-03-22'
     ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS b_start
JOIN
    (SELECT balance
     FROM trans t
     WHERE t.account_id = first_loan.account_id
       AND t.date = '1998-12-27'
     ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS b_end;	----- bird -----	financial

630:
SELECT DISTINCT tag AS TagName
FROM (
    WITH user_posts AS (
        SELECT p.Tags
        FROM posts p
        JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
        WHERE u.DisplayName = 'John Salvatier' AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
    ),
    tag_split(tag, rest) AS (
        SELECT
            substr(Tags, instr(Tags, '<') + 1,
                   instr(Tags, '>') - instr(Tags, '<') - 1),
            substr(Tags, instr(Tags, '>') + 1)
        FROM user_posts
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            substr(rest, instr(rest, '<') + 1,
                   instr(rest, '>') - instr(rest, '<') - 1),
            substr(rest, instr(rest, '>') + 1)
        FROM tag_split
        WHERE rest LIKE '%<%>%'
    )
    SELECT tag FROM tag_split WHERE tag <> ''
) ;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

944:
WITH race AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champ AS (
    SELECT time
    FROM results r
    JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
    WHERE r.position = 1
      AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    LIMIT 1
),
lastd AS (
    SELECT time
    FROM results r
    JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
    WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY r.position DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
times AS (
    SELECT
        (CAST(substr(champ.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(champ.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0) AS champ_sec,
        (CAST(substr(lastd.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
         CAST(substr(lastd.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
         CAST(substr(lastd.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
         CAST(substr(lastd.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0) AS last_sec
    FROM champ, lastd
)
SELECT ( (last_sec - champ_sec) * 100.0 / champ_sec ) AS percentage_faster
FROM times;	----- bird -----	formula_1

1016:
SELECT p.driverId,
       SUM(p.milliseconds) AS total_pit_milliseconds
FROM pitStops p
JOIN (
    SELECT r.raceId,
           lt.driverId
    FROM races r
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    JOIN lapTimes lt ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE c.name LIKE '%Austrian%'
      AND lt.milliseconds = (
          SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
          FROM lapTimes lt2
          WHERE lt2.raceId = r.raceId
      )
) AS rec
ON p.raceId = rec.raceId
AND p.driverId = rec.driverId
GROUP BY p.driverId;	----- bird -----	formula_1

    END AS More_Male,
    (CAST(in_cnt AS REAL) / NULLIF(out_cnt, 0)) * 100.0 AS Deviation_Percentage

    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS out_cnt FROM Patient WHERE SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-') AS outcount;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

1481:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID,
           c.Segment,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_per_seg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
avg_per_seg AS (
    SELECT y.Segment,
           AVG(y.total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM yearly y
    JOIN min_per_seg m
      ON y.Segment = m.Segment
     AND y.total_consumption = m.min_consumption
    GROUP BY y.Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
SELECT Segment, pct_change
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
         / SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) pct
WHERE pct_change = (SELECT MAX(pct_change) FROM pct)
   OR pct_change = (SELECT MIN(pct_change) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
